title: Kosmos Energy | Deepwater Exploration and Production
text:
Kosmos Energy is a leading deepwater exploration and production company focused on meeting the world’s growing demand for energy. We have diversified production, a world-class gas development, and value creation opportunities from exploration in the proven basins where we operate.
Latest News
Kosmos Energy Announces Third Quarter 2022 Results
November 7, 2022
DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Nov. 7, 2022-- Kosmos Energy Ltd. (“Kosmos” or the “Company”) (NYSE/LSE: KOS) announced today its financial and operating results for the third quarter of 2022. For the quarter, the Company generated a net income of $222 million, or $0.47 per diluted share. When adjusted for certain items that impact the comparability of results, the Company generated an adjusted net income(1) of $90 million, or $0.19 per diluted share for the third quarter of 2022.
Kosmos Energy to Host Third Quarter 2022 Results and Webcast on November 7, 2022
October 18, 2022
DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Oct. 18, 2022-- Kosmos Energy (NYSE/LSE: KOS) announced today the following schedule for its third quarter 2022 results.
Kosmos Energy Provides Further Update on Greater Tortue Ahmeyim FPSO
September 27, 2022
DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Sep. 27, 2022-- Kosmos Energy (NYSE/LSE: KOS) (“Kosmos” or the “Company”) reported on September 15, 2022 that the floating production, storage and offloading vessel (“FPSO”) for the Greater Tortue Ahmeyim project (“GTA”) had drifted approximately 200 meters off the quayside following the impact of Typhoon Muifa.
